mechanism_narrative: Sustained high retail sales above $520B reflect strong consumer spending, which boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If the 20-day forward rank IC of RSAFS is below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or if negative returns occur in more than 50% of months with RSAFS above 520000.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate drops below 2.0%, it signals aggressive monetary easing that compresses discount rates and increases equity valuations, leading to positive forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: If after FEDFUNDS drops below 2.0%, the average 60-day forward return is not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.10) or the hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: The joint condition of very low unemployment (below 4%) and rising interest rates (FEDFUNDS above 2.5%) signals an overheating economy and imminent Fed tightening, which depresses equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: If in months where UNRATE < 4% and FEDFUNDS > 2.5%, the 20-day forward returns are positive more than 40% of the time, or the average return is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: In an expansion regime where industrial production is above 105 (index 2017=100), further increases signal strong capacity utilization and economic momentum, leading to short-term positive forward returns over one week.
failure_condition: If when INDPRO > 105, the 5-day forward returns have a median below zero or the rank IC over rolling 6-month windows is consistently negative.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent gains in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) reflect a healthy labor market that supports consumer spending and corporate earnings, contributing to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If the 20-day forward rank IC of PAYEMS is below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or if the mechanism fails to predict positive returns in months with rising payrolls.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts (more than 10% month-over-month) signals a weakening construction sector and potential economic slowdown, leading to negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: If after a >10% monthly decline in HOUST, the 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 40% of cases, or the average return is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of strong retail sales (above $520B) and low federal funds rate (below 2.5%) creates a Goldilocks environment: robust consumption with cheap capital, boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: If in months where RSAFS > 520000 and FEDFUNDS < 2.5%, the 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of cases, or the average return is not significantly positive.

mechanism_narrative: In an overheating expansion with rising industrial production and unemployment below 4%, the economy risks labor shortages and Fed tightening, causing negative short-term equity returns over one week.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO > previous month value and UNRATE < 4.0%
failure_condition: If during months with rising INDPRO and UNRATE < 4%, the 5-day forward returns are positive in more than half of the observations, or the average return is not negative.
